name: memorydetective-plugin
description: iOS leak hunting and performance investigation. Bundles the memorydetective MCP server with a /perf-investigate skill. One-command install for Claude Code.

plugins.name: memorydetective
plugins.description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation: 36 MCP tools, 36-pattern cycle classifier with Swift fixTemplate snippets, summarizeTrace for single-call cross-schema trace synthesis with pre-rendered markdown card + /summarize-trace MCP prompt (v1.13), end-to-end abandoned-memory chain with v1.12 (analyzeAbandonedMemory + countAlive + findRetainers + verifyFix all surface reference-tree data), analyzeHangs auto cross-schema correlation, inspectTrace, diffMemgraphs reference-tree, detectLeaksInXCTest per-test CI gate with HTML reports, cleanupTraces ops tool, single-call build+boot+launch fixing the macOS 26.x leaks --outputGraph regression, replayScenario + captureScenarioState verify-fix loop, compareTracesByPattern for CI gating, /perf-investigate skill. CLI human-output surfaces abandoned-memory suspects by default. Reads .memgraph + .trace files; classifies retain cycles; bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP.
